"'''Duel of the Fates'''" is a [[roleplaying game]] article by [[Andy Collins]], published in [[Star Wars Gamer 1|''Star Wars Gamer'' 1]]. It describes what the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends#Duel in Theed|duel]] between [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] would have been like if it was played using rules from the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]].<ref name="Duel of the Fates" />

{{Magazine-stub|article}}
